function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - "nina@finance-workflow.example"
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
related_entities:
  - nina
---
Hi Nina,

Sure — I’m resending the 2025-12-01 invoice from Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH as requested.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write is final; verification checklist passes: attachment path was read, single attachment ordering trivially newest-first, recipient matches Nina canonical email, no forwarded quote fidelity issue, subject with colon-space is properly quoted. Next complete inbox workflow by deleting processed inbox file already read.
next_step.observation: Outbound email draft file was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md without tool error.

next_step.current_state: Processed oldest inbox item completely: validated sender identity, located exact requested invoice, created outbound draft, deleted inbox file. Ready to report completion.
next_step.observation: Processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md has been deleted successfully.

function.message: Completed the oldest inbox request by preparing an outbound resend draft to Nina with the requested 2025-12-01 Nordstern invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system before task work, used lowest inbox filename, treated email header as canonical transport metadata, verified sender via entity primary_contact_email, used exact workspace attachment path, and deleted inbox file only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence from 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md requested resending invoice dated 2025-12-01 from Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH; sender identity matched canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/nina.md; exact matching invoice found at 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md; outbound record created in 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md; then inbox item deleted per workflow.
